title: AI Agent Integration & LLM Orchestration
description: Designing and deploying autonomous AI agents using LangChain and LangGraph. Expertise in integrating LLMs into existing full-stack applications for automated data parsing, categorization, and intelligent database querying.

title: Full-Stack System Architecture & API Design
description: Architecting decoupled, high-performance web and mobile applications. Proficient in building strict-typed GraphQL APIs, RESTful services, and integrating state management tools with robust backend databases (PostgreSQL, MongoDB).

title: Event-Driven Data Flows & DevOps Integration
description: Engineering asynchronous messaging systems using Kafka and Confluent Cloud. Establishing reliable CI/CD pipelines with Jenkins and Docker to automate testing, ensure code quality via SonarQube, and streamline deployments.

title: Data Engineering & Predictive Modeling
description: Developing predictive machine learning algorithms to analyze historical data trends. Experienced in data pipeline construction, feature engineering, and utilizing techniques like SMOTE to balance datasets for highly accurate models.
